audits.finding: First-ever comprehensive audit. Failed across most categories.
Failed again. Only 7 of 24 sub-audits received clean opinions.
Third failure. COVID cited as complication.
Fourth failure. 1,600 auditors, still can't pass.
Fifth failure. Marine Corps passed for first time, rest failed.
Sixth failure. Can't account for 63% of $3.8T in assets.
Seventh failure. $2.5T unaccounted. Pentagon says 'momentum on our side.'
Eighth consecutive failure. GOP senator introduces audit legislation.
